login_subtitle: Sign in with your Memaix credentials
login_error_session_expired: Session expired — please sign in again.
cap.memory.remember.title: Remember things for you
cap.memory.remember.summary: Save notes, decisions and facts to project memory so nothing gets lost.
cap.memory.remember.examples: Remember that the client wants weekly updates
cap.memory.recall.title: Recall what you told me
cap.memory.recall.summary: Search and read back anything saved in project memory.
cap.memory.recall.examples: What did we decide about the deadline?
Find my notes about the kickoff meeting
cap.memory.undo.title: Undo a memory change
cap.memory.undo.summary: Revert a memory note to a previous version.
cap.memory.notes_sync.title: Sync with Nextcloud Notes
cap.memory.notes_sync.summary: Two-way sync between your Nextcloud Notes and memory notes — new notes are pulled in, and changes on either side are kept in sync (most-recently-changed wins on conflict). Owner only.
cap.memory.notes_sync.examples: Sync my memory notes with Nextcloud Notes
Pull in any new Nextcloud notes
cap.mail.triage.title: Keep track of your inbox
cap.mail.triage.summary: List, search and read your project mailbox.
cap.mail.triage.examples: Show me unread mail from this week
Find the email about the contract
cap.mail.draft.title: Prepare email drafts
cap.mail.draft.summary: Write a draft for you to review before sending.
cap.mail.draft.examples: Draft a reply to that client email
cap.mail.send.title: Send email on your behalf
cap.mail.send.summary: Send an email once you approve it (owner only).
cap.mail.send.examples: Send the approved draft to the client
cap.calendar.view.title: Check your calendar
cap.calendar.view.summary: List events and find free time slots.
cap.calendar.view.examples: Find a free hour this week
cap.calendar.manage.title: Manage calendar events
cap.calendar.manage.examples: Book a meeting with the team on Thursday
cap.calendar.connect.title: Connect your calendar
cap.calendar.connect.summary: Choose how Memaix accesses your calendar (Google OAuth, iCal, or free/busy).
cap.files.manage.title: Work with project files
cap.files.manage.summary: List, read, search and write files in the project vault.
cap.files.manage.examples: List the files in the contracts folder
cap.files.nextcloud.title: Work with Nextcloud files
cap.files.nextcloud.summary: List, read, search and write files in the project's linked Nextcloud — separate from the project vault, useful when the client's files live there.
cap.files.nextcloud.examples: List the files in the shared Nextcloud folder
cap.tasks.nextcloud.title: Track tasks in Nextcloud
cap.tasks.nextcloud.summary: List, add, and complete tasks in the project's linked Nextcloud task list.
cap.tasks.nextcloud.examples: What's on my Nextcloud task list?
Add a task to follow up with the client
Mark the invoice task as done
cap.backlog.capture.title: Capture new ideas
cap.backlog.capture.summary: Add a new item to the project backlog.
cap.backlog.capture.examples: Add a backlog item for the new feature request
cap.backlog.review.title: Review the backlog
cap.backlog.score.title: Score and discuss items
cap.backlog.score.summary: Add value/complexity/risk scores or comments to a backlog item.
cap.backlog.score.examples: Score this item as high value, low complexity
cap.backlog.decide.title: Decide item status
cap.backlog.decide.summary: Move a backlog item to a new status (owner only).
cap.backlog.deck_sync.title: Sync with Nextcloud Deck
cap.backlog.deck_sync.summary: Two-way sync between a Nextcloud Deck board and the backlog — new cards become backlog items, and changes on either side are kept in sync (most-recently-changed wins on conflict). Owner only.
cap.backlog.deck_sync.examples: Sync the backlog with our Deck board
Pull in any new Deck cards
cap.pm.methodology.title: Set project methodology
cap.pm.methodology.summary: Configure methodology and sprint capacity (owner only).
cap.pm.methodology.examples: Set this project to Scrum with 2-week sprints
cap.pm.sprint_plan.title: Plan a sprint
cap.pm.sprint_plan.summary: Commit backlog items into a sprint (owner only).
cap.pm.sprint_plan.examples: Plan the next sprint from the approved backlog
cap.pm.sprint_status.title: Check sprint progress
cap.pm.sprint_status.summary: See burndown and remaining points for a sprint.
cap.pm.raid_add.title: Log a risk or issue
cap.pm.raid_add.summary: Add a Risk/Assumption/Issue/Dependency entry to the project log.
cap.pm.raid_add.examples: Log a risk about the vendor delay
cap.pm.raid_view.title: Review risks and issues
cap.pm.raid_view.examples: What risks are open right now?
cap.pm.report.title: Generate a status report
cap.pm.report.summary: Create a status snapshot from backlog, RAID and notes.
cap.pm.report.examples: Give me a status report for this project
cap.pm.planning_engine.title: Plan resources and tasks with the PM engine
cap.pm.planning_engine.summary: Model resources, capacity and task dependencies, then compute a real critical-path schedule and resource-constrained allocation — the engine calculates, never guesses; you approve the plan.
cap.pm.planning_engine.examples: Add Anna as a resource with 6 hours/day capacity
What's the critical path for this project?
How utilized is the team next month?
What happens to the deadline if we lose Anna for two weeks?
cap.outbox.review.title: Review the outbox
cap.outbox.review.summary: See queued outgoing actions (emails, calendar changes) and approve or reject them before they go out.
cap.undo.timeline.title: Undo a recent action
cap.undo.timeline.summary: See a timeline of recent actions and undo the ones that support it.
cap.search.ask.title: Ask across everything
cap.search.ask.summary: Search memory, files, backlog and mail at once — with source citations you can trust.
cap.search.ask.examples: What did we promise the client about the deadline?
cap.brief.daily.title: Get a daily brief
cap.brief.daily.summary: A scheduled summary of your calendar, mail, backlog changes and open risks, delivered to a channel you choose.
cap.brief.daily.examples: Set up a daily brief for me at 7am
cap.automation.rules.title: Automate with rules
cap.automation.rules.summary: Set up 'when X happens, do Y' rules that run without you being there.
cap.automation.rules.examples: When mail arrives from a client, add it to the backlog
cap.automation.standing.title: Set standing instructions
cap.automation.standing.summary: Guidance the assistant follows every session, like 'always write in Swedish'.
tour.greeting: Nice to meet you! Based on what you told me, here's a few things I could take off your plate right now:
cap.lock.no_role: You don't have access to this in any project yet — ask a project owner to add you.
cap.lock.no_mailbox: No mailbox is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.no_calendar: No calendar is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.no_vault: No project vault is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.link_google: Link your Google account to unlock this — run account_link('google').
cap.lock.link_microsoft: Link your Microsoft account to unlock this — run account_link('microsoft').
cap.lock.no_contacts: No address book is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.no_files: No Nextcloud files connection is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.no_tasks: No Nextcloud task list is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.no_deck: No Nextcloud Deck board is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.lock.no_notes: No Nextcloud Notes connection is configured for this yet — ask an admin to set one up.
cap.contacts.search.title: Look up a contact
cap.contacts.search.summary: Search your linked address book (e.g. Nextcloud) by name, email, organization, or phone number.
cap.contacts.search.examples: Find the phone number for Erik at Acme
web_settings_link_started: Complete the sign-in in the new window.
web_memory_pick: Select a note to view it.
web_admin_llm_byo: Bring your own AI (your Claude/ChatGPT app drives Memaix)
web_timeline_conflict: Item changed since — refusing to overwrite.
web_mfa_setup_help: Add this to your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code:
web_admin_last_admin: Refused: would disable the last active admin.
